name: data-modelling-lab
description: An educational web application for learning data modelling from scratch

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d && npm install && npm run db:migrate -w server && npm run db:seed -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
